'''Castion Vogol''' was a corporate executive of [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] who attended the [[Spira Regatta Open]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] race. Vogol, who attended [[Aneash Maglea]]'s private reception prior to the regatta, dressed in a [[Septsilk/Legends|septsilk]] suit and used a jeweled walking stick.
